case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HUMBERTO ATILANO GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, HUMBERTO ATILANO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, HUMBERTO ATILANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUMBERTO ATILANO GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, HUMBERTO ATILANO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
